'''Yabeley''' was a young [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who served the [[New Jedi Order]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. In [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]], he was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] alongside [[Bey Gandan]] and [[Klin-Fa Gi]], and would later develop a crush on Klin-Fa. The trio traveled to [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]] to investigate the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] presence on the [[Planet/Legends|world]], whereupon they were captured by the Yuuzhan Vong, who [[Torture/Legends|tortured]] Yabeley to [[Death/Legends|death]] in an interrogation attempt.
